title: KSI’s departure from Sidemen triggers fresh debate after group releases clarifying statement
summary_full: The Sidemen have released a statement following KSI’s departure from the group. While they said they respect his decision, they revealed that the announcement came before a mutual plan had been agreed upon. The group hoped to organize a proper farewell but said events unfolded differently. Despite the change, the remaining members confirmed they will continue creating content together.
